hooks.command: if (Get-Module -ListAvailable -Name BurntToast) { Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code','Claude finished' } else { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms,System.Drawing; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code'; $n.BalloonTipText = 'Claude finished'; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $n.Dispose() }
